heading: Adequacy of funding to local educational agencies in fiscal years after fiscal year 2001
label: 6336 Adequacy of funding to local educational agencies in fiscal years after fiscal year 2001
text: Pursuant to , the total amount allocated in any fiscal year after fiscal year 2001 for programs and activities under this part shall not exceed the amount allocated in fiscal year 2001 for such programs and activities unless the amount available for targeted grants to local educational agencies under in the applicable fiscal year meets the requirements of .section 6332 of this titlesection 6335 of this titlesection 6332(a) of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6336, , as added , , , related to education finance incentive program, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by .Pub. L. 89–10, title I, § 1125APub. L. 103–382, title I, § 101108 Stat. 3575Pub. L. 107–110Oct. 20, 1994

Amendments2015—, in section catchline, struck out “of targeted grants” after “Adequacy of funding” and, in text, struck out subsec. (a), which set forth Congressional findings, and struck out subsec. (b) designation and heading before “Pursuant”.Pub. L. 114–95

Effective Date of 2015 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 114–95section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95section 6301 of this titleDec. 10, 2015
